source_title: Matthieu Koroma - Selective processing and associative transfer learning in the sleeping brain
reference_text: I also want to share with you that I'm part of the alius research group, which is an international research group.
notes: Reference clip extracted from reviewed public YouTube lecture audio and cleaned with the standard lecture_cleanup filter. Current reference is sub-12 seconds to avoid F5 prompt truncation. Whisper tiny.en misheard ALIUS as address, so the caption-backed text is retained pending listening review. Previous local interview-source reference remains in AudioTranscription/references/Issue07_Froese_Koroma/ for comparison.

rejected_reference_candidates.reason: Fourteen-second reference exceeded F5's safe prompt length and ended mid-sentence.
Shorter clip was sentence-bounded, but tiny.en ASR missed the opening phrase too badly for a clean prompt transcript.
